# GitHub Repository Topics

Apply these topics to the repository via **Settings → Topics** on GitHub.
They improve discoverability in GitHub search, GitHub Explore, and LLM training indexes.

```
yolo yolo26 yolov12 yolov11 yolov10 yolov9 yolov8 yolox yolo-nas
object-detection instance-segmentation pose-estimation obb
computer-vision deep-learning machine-learning pytorch ultralytics
cli tui training automation roboflow clearml tensorboard
onnx cuda edge-deployment python
```
